title: Federal Realty Investment Trust Announces First Quarter 2023 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call Information
text: NORTH BETHESDA, Md. , April 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) will announce first quarter 2023 earnings in a press release to be issued after market close on Thursday May 4, 2023.

title: I Am Buying These REITs During This Correction
text: There are lots of opportunities following the recent correction. Many REITs are priced at exceptionally low valuations.

title: Federal Realty: A Dividend King's Close-Up
text: In this article, I discuss a true dividend king. Federal Realty has hiked its dividend for 55 consecutive years, protecting investors and their dividend income in various recessions. While current macroeconomic headwinds are severe, FRT has a fantastic portfolio of top-tier retail assets, allowing the company to protect the dividend and offset inflation-related risks.

title: 3 Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy and Never Sell
text: One of the best ways to find strong long-term investments is to look for stocks that have increased dividends consistently. Stocks known as dividend aristocrats are those that have raised their dividend payments every year consecutively for at least 25 years.

title: 14 dividend stocks yielding 4% or more that are expected to increase payouts in 2023 and 2024
text: If you invest in dividend stocks, you are probably looking for long-term growth to go with the income. Otherwise you might be content to hold one-month U.S. Treasury bills, which yield 4.5% or park your money in an online savings account for a yield close to 4%.

title: Federal Realty: Still Waiting To Buy The REIT Dividend King Yielding 4.37%
text: I am willing to make an exception in yield for shares of FRT as its longevity is worth its weight in gold with 55 years of consecutive annual dividend increases. FRT's diversified approach has been a winning combination for decades, and I am intrigued by its tenant diversification as no tenant makes up more than 3% of its ABR.

title: Buy These 3 Stocks While They're Still Cheap
text: Stag Industrial pays dividends monthly, and the industrial REIT's stock is still a bargain. Apple Hospitality REIT is a comeback kid with a great dividend yield.

title: 3 Simple Reasons Federal Realty Is a Better Dividend Investment Than Brixmor
text: Brixmor owns a sizable collection of strip malls, many of which have redevelopment opportunities. Federal Realty owns a modest collection of strip malls and mixed-use developments, in which it invests in redevelopment.
